parsed.availability_comment: Recent injury concern eased by formal clearance; near-full availability expected unless managed tactically.
parsed.availability_note: Hamstring issue was cleared before Australia's T20 World Cup opener on February 10, 2026; no later adverse IPL availability report found.
parsed.followup_reason: Need actual CSK playing XI/toss evidence from March 30, 2026 onward to separate rotation from first-choice selection.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Availability looks fine, but selection is squeezed by CSK's foreign balance.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes with Noor Ahmad, Jamie Overton, Akeal Hosein, Matt Henry, Dewald Brevis and others for four overseas slots.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Fit specialist seamer, but CSK have multiple overseas bowling options and no confirmed XI evidence yet for the listed fixtures.
